title: quercus gilva
intro: Quercus gilva, also known as the Evergreen Oak or Chinese Evergreen Oak, is a species of deciduous tree native to East Asia, characterized by its dark green, leathery leaves and brown, woody bark. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus gilva include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
